analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov asserts Russia’s respect for Venezuela’s sovereignty and solidarity with its leaders and people against “illegal pressure” from the US and its accomplices. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): The tweet labels US actions as “illegal pressure” and mentions its “accomplices,” portraying the West/US as hostile and wrongful—this aligns with RU1. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): While sovereignty and multilateral respect are invoked, there is no explicit framing of an alternative system or multilateral platform; thus not clearly supported. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): The tweet highlights Russia’s solidarity and respect for sovereignty, positioning Russia as supportive and principled—a reliable partner—so RU3 applies. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not referenced. RU5 (Russia at the forefront): No claims of current successes. RU6 (culture/nature): Not relevant. Conclusion: RU1 and RU3 are promoted.
